summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of 'Toothfully Yours' dental clinic landing page. All 8 sections render correctly with required content, all 40+ data-testid hooks are present, navigation/scroll/form/routing all work as specified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x844). Contact form successfully POSTs and routes to /thank-you which renders correctly and Return Home navigates back to /.

test_coverage_details.rendering: PASS - landing-page testid present, all 8 sections present (hero, services, about, values, team, testimonials, gallery, contact) + footer
test_coverage_details.navbar: PASS - sticky, becomes more opaque on scroll (bg rgba(255,255,255,0.4) -> 0.667), all 5 nav links smooth-scroll to correct sections, nav-cta-book scrolls to contact, mobile hamburger opens/closes panel and links work + close panel after click
test_coverage_details.hero: PASS - headline 'Every version of you deserves a great smile.' present, subheadline present, hero-cta-book scrolls to #contact (top=0.33px), hero-cta-explore scrolls to #services
test_coverage_details.services: PASS - 4 circular cards with titles Cosmetic & Aesthetic Care, Implants & Restoration, Corrective Alignment, Neuromuscular Dentistry
test_coverage_details.about: PASS - label 'ABOUT DR. AMRUTA GODBOLE', heading 'Toothfully speaking.', bio and about-doctor-image rendered
test_coverage_details.values: PASS - dark #545454 bg, 5 value cards present (3 top row, 2 bottom row)
test_coverage_details.team: PASS - 3 circular team cards Dr. Manish Kachhara (Oral Implantologist), Dr. Prasad GSV (MDS, Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery), Dr. Paras Kothari (MDS, Micro-Endodontist)
test_coverage_details.gallery: PASS - 5 gallery images in mosaic grid, all loaded
test_coverage_details.contact: PASS - hours '10:00 AM - 7:00 PM', phone '+91 87690 05504' (tel: link), email 'dramrutagodbole@gmail.com' (mailto: link), address with Khar West, Mumbai, Instagram & Facebook icons
test_coverage_details.contact_form: PASS - name='contact', method='POST', action='/thank-you', data-netlify='true', netlify-honeypot='bot-field', hidden form-name input with value='contact', all 5 fields (name/phone/email/service select/message) present, submit button wired. Live submit navigated to /thank-you successfully.
test_coverage_details.service_dropdown: PASS - exactly contains: Cosmetic & Aesthetic Care, Implants & Restoration, Corrective Alignment, Neuromuscular Dentistry, General Checkup (plus the disabled placeholder '')
test_coverage_details.footer: PASS - dark #545454 bg, 'Toothfully Yours' logo, tagline 'COSMETIC · SMILES · RESTORATIONS', 5 footer links functional, copyright present
test_coverage_details.thank_you_route: PASS - /thank-you renders thank-you-page testid, Return Home link navigates back to / and Landing renders
test_coverage_details.typography: PASS - heading uses 'Playfair Display', serif with font-style: italic; body uses 'DM Sans', sans-serif
test_coverage_details.mobile_375: PASS - mobile-toggle visible, panel opens on click, links scroll & close panel, hero CTA full-width (327px in 375 viewport accounting for px-6 padding)
test_coverage_details.images: PASS - 0 broken images on full page
test_coverage_details.console_errors: Only environment-related errors (NOT app code): 1x 404 for an external resource (likely favicon/beacon), 1x CSP block of Cloudflare Insights beacon script. No React/app-level errors.

critical_code_review_comments: Navbar 'hidden form-name input' in Landing.jsx is correctly present (required for Netlify). Honeypot field 'bot-field' is also wired - good.
Hero anchor <a href='#contact'> relies on native anchor jump (no smooth-scroll like nav links). Consider applying handleNavClick for consistency; minor UX nit only.
Navbar.jsx mobile panel uses conditional render rather than aria-expanded - functional but could improve a11y.
All env vars (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) are not used in this frontend-only app, which is acceptable for the stated scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All hero, nav, sections, form, /thank-you routing, mobile responsive, and Netlify form attributes verified. Only env-side console warnings (CSP block of cloudflareinsights beacon) - safe to ignore. Contact form POST in dev preview navigates to /thank-you via React Router SPA fallback as expected; full Netlify capture only works on Netlify production.
